subcodes.first_line: The victory hath indeed arrived, and by it the banners of dominion have been raised above all other standards by God, the Incomparable, the Almighty, the All-Knowing
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی النصر و به نصبت رآیه الاقتدار علی اعلی الاعلام من لدی الله الواحد
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @prayer for service, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @banishment to; life in 'Akka
